name: Restaurant & F&B
description: Daily stock reconciliation, supplier reorder drafts, reservation management, and petty-cash logging for small restaurants and F&B operators. Reorders and supplier messages are drafted for the owner to approve before they go out.

agents.name: fnb-coordinator
agents.description: Routes the owner's request to stock, supplier, or front-of-house work. Holds the menu, supplier, and takings context.

agents.name: stock-sense
agents.description: Reads POS and delivery notes, computes daily variance, and flags what to reorder before you run out.

agents.name: supplier-relay
agents.description: Drafts reorder messages per supplier in their preferred channel and format — held for approval.

agents.name: table-sync
agents.description: Manages reservations, drafts confirmations, and keeps the floor plan clash-free.

subagents.name: pos-reader
subagents.description: Parses the day's POS export and delivery notes into a normalised sales-and-receipts table.

subagents.name: reorder-drafter
subagents.description: Turns the variance report into per-supplier reorder quantities against par levels.

subagents.name: floor-planner
subagents.description: Checks proposed reservations against table capacity and turn times to avoid clashes.

guardrails: Reorders and supplier messages are drafts until the owner approves them
Stock variance is computed from POS and delivery data — never estimated without a source
Daily takings and petty cash reconciled to the cent; discrepancies flagged, not smoothed over
Customer reservation details stored under /workspace/service/<date>/ — not in memory

inspirations.title: Daily stock reconciliation
inspirations.prompt: Reconcile today's orders against stock from the POS export and this morning's delivery note. Tell me what to reorder before Saturday.

inspirations.title: Supplier reorder
inspirations.prompt: Draft my reorder messages — vegetables to Kwan's on WhatsApp, dry goods to the wholesaler by email. Use my usual par levels.

inspirations.title: Manage reservations
inspirations.prompt: I have 6 bookings for Friday dinner plus two walk-in requests. Lay out a clash-free floor plan and draft the confirmation messages.

inspirations.title: Daily takings
inspirations.prompt: Reconcile today's takings against the POS total and the petty cash float. Flag any discrepancy and log the daily summary.
